headline: Friday is your battlefield—choose discipline today
summary: You're gaining when you need to lose; today's food choices and movement will determine if you start catching up to your 88kg goal.
details: Eliminate food decisions by using Huel pre-portioned meals all day—no snacking, no choices, no emotional eating on this vulnerable Friday. Get 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to burn the kJ deficit you need. This single day matters because every week you're adding 0.08kg instead of losing 0.67kg—today you stop the bleed.
